subject: Reasoning & Mental Ability
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match kiya waha answer bhara hai (answer_source dekho).

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. Which digit will appear on the face opposite to the face with number 4?
questions.solution: Adjacent faces of 3 are 1, 2, 5 and 6. Therefore, faces 3 and 4 are opposite.

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. Which number will appear on the face opposite to the face with the number 5?
questions.solution: Rotate the 2nd dice such that it shows 3 only. Then compare the faces of the two dice.

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. When number 1 is on the top, which number will be at the bottom?
questions.solution: Common adjacent faces of 4 and 6 are 1 and 5.

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. When the surface with 4 touches the bottom, which surface will be on the top?
questions.solution: Adjacent faces of 1 are 2, 3, 5 and 6.

questions.question_text: The sheet of a paper shown in the figure (X) given on the left hand side, is folded to form a box. Choose amongst the options (1), (2), (3) and (4), that are similar to the box that will be formed.
questions.solution: 2 only

questions.question_text: Count the number of cubes in the given solid in the following question.
questions.solution: Bottom layer has 5 cubes and top layer has 1 cube.

questions.question_text: Count the number of cubes in the given solid in the following question.
questions.solution: Bottom layer has 3 cubes and top layer has 1 cube.

questions.question_text: Count the number of cubes in the given solid in the following question.
questions.solution: Each layer contains 9 cubes.

questions.question_text: Count the number of cubes in the given solid in the following question.
questions.solution: The bottom layer contains 9 cubes, middle layer 5 cubes and top layer 1 cube.

questions.question_text: Count the number of cubes in the given solid in the following question.
questions.solution: The bottom layer contains 9 cubes and middle and top layer contains 1 cube each.

questions.question_text:
A solid cube of each side 4 cm, has been painted all faces. It is then cut into cubical blocks each of side 2 cm.
How many cubes have no face painted?
questions.solution: Number of cubes unpainted = 0.

questions.question_text:
A solid cube of each side 4 cm, has been painted all faces. It is then cut into cubical blocks each of side 2 cm.
How many cubes have only one face painted?
questions.solution: Number of cubes have only one face painted = 0

questions.question_text:
A solid cube of each side 4 cm, has been painted all faces. It is then cut into cubical blocks each of side 2 cm.
How many cubes have only two faces painted?
questions.solution: Number of cubes have only two faces painted = 0

questions.question_text: The two positions are of the same dice whose each surface bears a number among 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 and 6. What number is opposite to 3?
questions.solution: Adjacent faces of 5 are 1, 2, 4 and 6.

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. When 4 dots will be at the bottom, then how many dots will be at the top?
questions.solution: Make upside down of the second dice such that only one dot appears at the same position that is right face.

questions.solution: Number of dots on the opposite faces are (3, 2), (4, 6), (5, 1)

questions.question_text:

How many dots will be on the face opposite to the face having 4 dots?
questions.solution: Number of dots on the opposite faces are (1, 6), (2, 4), (3, 5)

questions.question_text:
Four different positions of a dice are shown below.
What is the sum of the numbers opposite to 5 and 3?
questions.solution:
Numbers on the opposite faces are (1, 6), (2, 5), (3, 4)

So, required sum = 2 + 4 = 6

questions.question_text: Which of the following numbers lies on the face opposite to the face having number 5, when the given figure is folded to form a cube?
questions.solution: Numbers on the opposite faces are (1, 3), (2, 5), (4, 6).

questions.question_text:

Which number is on the face opposite to the face having number 2?
questions.solution: Numbers on the opposite faces are (1, 6), (2, 4) and (3, 5).

questions.question_text: Three positions of a dice are given. Based on them find out which number is opposite the number 2 in the given dice.
questions.solution: Faces adjacent to face 6 are 1, 3, 4 and 5. Therefore, faces bearing 6 and 2 are opposite to each other.

questions.question_text: Three different positions of a dice are shown below. Find the number on the face opposite the face showing 2.
questions.solution: Faces adjacent to face 2 are1, 3, 4 and 6.

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. What is the number of dots at the bottom face when the dice is in position (i)?
questions.solution: Faces adjacent to face 2 are 1, 3, 4 and 5.

questions.question_text: The two positions of a dice are given below. What number will be at the bottom, if 5 is at the top?
questions.solution: Faces adjacent to face 2 are 1, 3, 4 and 6.

questions.question_text: Two positions of a dice are shown below. Identify the number at the bottom when 3 is on the top.

questions.solution: You have to obtain a number opposite to 1. Rotate the figure (ii) horizontally such that 4 takes place of 5.

questions.solution: Faces adjacent to face 6 are 2, 3, 4 and 5.
